variables.notes: No explicit COGS/distribution-specific depreciation or amortisation row appears in the operating section. The only visible operating D&A-like line is a company-level mixed row that includes impairment, so it should not be assigned to the selected COGS bucket of 'Distribution costs'.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Separate operating-level line item alongside the selected SG&A component rows, so it appears outside those selected XSGA component rows. However, the label explicitly includes impairment as well as depreciation, and the task says to ignore impairment rows to avoid adding non-D&A amounts.

variables.notes: R:c. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows excluded depreciation. A separate operating line exists, but it is a mixed 'depreciation and impairment' row rather than a clean D&A-only row. To avoid adding impairment and double counting/non-operating distortions, no row is selected automatically.
